one_line_thesis: ADM is a global agricultural processor with unmatched origination and crush scale, now exiting a commodity-margin trough and SEC/DOJ investigations.

deep_dive.executive_summary: ADM is a global agricultural processor with unmatched origination and crush scale, now exiting a commodity-margin trough and SEC/DOJ investigations. FY2025 free cash flow per share is about $8.69 on 484 million diluted shares; net debt is roughly $7.4 billion (~$15 per share). At ~$86 (July 2026), the seven-year Lawrence owner-cash path implies about 12% per year, but proof-first component math sums to ~$69 per share base economic value, below the quote. Moat is stable (network scale, not pricing power); partial dhando because leverage and commodity cyclicality cap the bear case. Marvin pro...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

decision.primary_power_zone: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity ~$24B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($8.686/sh), not GAAP book alone.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADM, including global origination/processing owner cash, Nutrition specialty upside, net financial claims, and commodity-cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated processing engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; Nutrition option, net debt, and cycle reserve are separate overlap keys.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Ag Services & Oilseeds plus Carbohydrate Solutions normalized free cash flow
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm: FY2025 revenue $80269.0M, OCF $5452.0M, FCF $4204.0M, cash $1015.0M, debt $8410.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: OCF recovery year; earnings trough does not fully reflect cash generation.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Incremental Nutrition specialty monetization beyond consolidated FCF
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm: FY2025 revenue $80269.0M, OCF $5452.0M, FCF $4204.0M, cash $1015.0M, debt $8410.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Intersegment sales investigation closed Jan 2026; controls remediated Jun 2025.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Specialty ingredients ramp over 3–5 years per segment disclosures.
risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that Nutrition OP exceeds $500M sustainably; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Nutrition capex embedded in consolidated spending; no separate proof line.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Net corporate debt after cash and operating minimum
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm: FY2025 revenue $80269.0M, OCF $5452.0M, FCF $4204.0M, cash $1015.0M, debt $8410.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Operating cash minimum judgment for commodity working capital.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

valuation_proof.economic_claim: Crush-margin cyclicality and prior controls remediation tail
valuation_proof.evidence: Primary bridge from ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm: FY2025 revenue $80269.0M, OCF $5452.0M, FCF $4204.0M, cash $1015.0M, debt $8410.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation_proof.adjustment: Partial dhando: net debt and commodity trough cap stance despite scale.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

timeline.label: Operating Cash Flow moved +95.4% versus the prior period (2,790.0 to 5,452.0).
Net income moved -40.1% versus the prior period (1,800.0 to 1,078.0).
SEC settlement ($40M civil penalty) resolves intersegment-sales investigation; DOJ closes inquiry — removes major governance overhang
FY2025: revenue $80.3B (−6% YoY); net income $1.08B (EPS $2.23); OCF $5.45B recovers from FY2024 trough
Material weakness in financial reporting controls fully remediated per Audit Committee oversight
CFO transition and voluntary accounting investigation into intersegment sales between Nutrition and processing segments announced
FY2023 peak earnings cycle: net income $3.48B on $93.9B revenue before commodity margin compression
Nutrition segment growth strategy accelerates human-ingredients and flavor acquisitions; intersegment sales increase
Sustained share repurchases (~$2.3–2.7B annually FY2022–FY2024) while commodity cycle peaked
Carbon reduction and sustainable sourcing programs embedded in Ag Services & Oilseeds origination network
Juan Luciano continues as chair/CEO; Ag Services & Oilseeds leadership restructured
Nutrition segment formed through acquisitions (WILD Flavors, etc.) to diversify beyond commodity processing

industry.structure: Global agricultural processing oligopoly: ADM, Bunge (BG), Cargill (private), and Louis Dreyfus compete on origination scale, crush capacity, and logistics. Pricing power is limited; scale and network density are the moat.
industry.share_shift: ADM maintains top-tier global origination footprint; Nutrition specialty mix growing but commodity crush margins compressed FY2024–FY2025. Private Cargill and BG face same cycle dynamics.
industry.trend: Biofuels demand, sustainable sourcing, and human-nutrition ingredients shift revenue mix; SEC scrutiny of intersegment controls resolved Jan 2026. Crush-margin cyclicality and net debt (~$7.4B) remain key owner concerns.
